creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
When doing incremental rebuilds of world with -DNO_CLEANDIR -DNO_CLEAN after changing a file of libc, libc.so.7 is being rebuilt but libc.a is not.  This is very confusing to get different results depending on whether you link -static or not.

I assume it is a general build framework problem beyond libc, that's just where I noticed it in the obj directory when trying to link -static to libc.a from there.
